name_en: In stock Chane✨New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag
name_cn:
In stock Chane✨New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag
Imported Calfskin, Diamond Hardware 🌺
Classic Pearlized Apricot New Color, Calfskin Piquadro, Light Apricot
Twist closure with sliding chain, switch between shoulder and crossbody. The bag looks very exquisite and versatile. This pink-gold color really catches the eye 🤩 A mix of girly and luxurious, paired with light gold hardware, full of queen vibes 💋🌸
Size 25.5 15 6cm
Number:1112
